tools.name: detect_pii
tools.title: Detect PII in text
tools.description: Scan a block of text with Privaro's PII detection engine. Returns detected entities (names, emails, IBAN, DNI, phone, SSN, credit cards, IPs, session IDs, policy numbers) and an optional tokenized/protected version of the text.

text.description: Raw text to scan for sensitive data.

protect.description: If true, also return the text with detected entities replaced by Privaro tokens.

tools.name: describe_privaro
tools.title: About Privaro
tools.description: Return a structured overview of the Privaro platform: what it does, who it's for, its core components, and useful URLs.
